data.title: iProov Issues Annual Threat Intelligence Report
data.description: In London, iProov, a top provider of science-based biometric identity verification solutions, unveiled its 2026 Threat Intelligence Report. By analyzing real-time data of criminal actions globally, the report highlights the utilization of generative AI by threat actors to advance their strategies swiftly and on a larger magnitude. This technology allows them to initiate attacks more rapidly, focusing on entities depending on digital identity verification for safeguarding entry to systems and significant transactions.

data.title: UBS teams up with 5 banks for Swiss franc stablecoin sandbox test till 2026, exploring blockchain payments in Switzerland.
data.description: A group of financial institutions including UBS, PostFinance, and Sygnum have introduced a new sandbox initiative set to run until 2026. The program aims to explore potential applications for a Swiss franc stablecoin, as well as testing blockchain-based payment infrastructure within Switzerland.

data.title: Three traders on Polymarket correctly predicted a US-Iran ceasefire, placing bets with odds between 2.9% and 10.3% within 26 hours of the news.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, bets with a "yes" outcome were made with odds ranging from 2.9% to 10.3%. These bets were placed by three wallets, with all three making their initial wagers within 26 hours of the announcement.

data.title: Semidynamics Secures a Strategic Investment to Advance Memory-Centric AI Inference Chips
data.description: A notable investment has allowed for a partnership focusing on cutting-edge AI infrastructure tailored for memory-heavy tasks. This collaboration involves Semidynamics, a tech company specializing in advanced computing. The initiative aims to develop next-generation AI infrastructure optimized for memory-intensive workloads. The venture is set in Barcelona, Spain, with the announcement made on April 8, 2026. This strategic move underscores the growing importance of efficient memory handling in AI processes. Stay tuned for more updates on this developing project.
